problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus may resolve How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
